_status: DRAFT — 35 characters have official portraits (wiki-wide scrape; see _manifest.json). Klein persona rules per DESIGN.md §3. Some anchors null (pin during Scene Timeline). Most non-Klein 'aliases' empty and to be verified; do not assume canon.

_adding_images._note: This roster is OPEN — add a portrait for ANY character/name (even minor ones) whenever an image is found. The per-batch Scene Timeline tracks every named character present and lists which ones lack a portrait (see DESIGN.md §10).
how_to_add: 1. Put the image file in image_dir (prefer a tall, full-body or bust portrait on a clean/transparent background so it composes in a multi-character row).
3. Re-run the affected batch's timeline; the character now resolves to that image.
Viability: landscape banners / very low-res images are flagged 'row_viable=false' in _manifest.json and are skipped in group (row) scenes.

protagonist._note: All portraits below depict the protagonist (Klein). Per-scene resolution order: (1) if the scene is a Tarot Club context -> context_override.tarot_club; (2) if the text uses an explicit alias -> alias_to_image; (3) otherwise the base_persona_timeline by chapter; (4) 'The World' identity uses the_world_identity rules.

base_persona_timeline.trigger: very beginning, until the name 'Klein' is first mentioned
base_persona_timeline._verified: ch1 line 93 is first 'Klein Moretti' mention

base_persona_timeline.trigger: the name 'Klein' is first mentioned (within ch 1)
base_persona_timeline.anchor_within_chapter: from ch 1 line 93: 'Klein Moretti, a citizen of the Northern Continent's Loen Kingdom...'

base_persona_timeline._candidate: ch 16 line 91 is Klein still only *contemplating* joining; actual induction not yet pinned (needs context read ~ch 13-20)

base_persona_timeline._verified: ch215 (Mrs. Sammer) line 79: 'Sherlock Moriarty. You can call me Sherlock.' Klein had long thought of a fake name.

context_override._note: Any scene framed in the Tarot Club / above the gray fog -> The Fool, regardless of base persona.

the_world_identity._note: 'The World' is an alternate identity of Klein introduced ~middle of Volume 2. Not keyword-findable; pin by context read.
the_world_identity._verified_gehrman_created: ch483 (New Identity) line 47: '...In accordance with Klein's wishes, his name was Gehrman Sparrow.'
the_world_identity._introduced_note: The World's introduction mid-Vol 2 still needs a context read to pin.

Alger Wilson._note: Tarot Club; clean Official.jpg was gallery-only (not in category). Tarot seat alias to verify.

Audrey Hall._note: Tarot Club; clean Official.jpg was gallery-only (not in category). Tarot seat alias to verify.
